name_en: 《 🍷》Mimi 🚩🚩🚩 OHANEL New CF Hidden Edition 🙈 Really loved it at first glance. I just 🤩🤩 love this simple style, it is more versatile and durable 💖 What is special is that usually the strap is leather with chain, this coffee leather strap is more high-end and retro, a fashionable item! Size: 25cm! Small 20cm
